name: plan-why-build-this
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>plan>review>handoff>audit |
 scope: repo|paths(glob,...) |
 policy: evidence,quality-gates{docs,compat},deterministic-output |
 lens: christensen-jtbd |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: PROBLEM_STATEMENT
required_inputs.description: Plain-language statement of the problem worth solving.

required_inputs.name: TARGET_AUDIENCE
required_inputs.description: Primary users or stakeholder groups and the context they are in.

required_inputs.name: DESIRED_OUTCOMES
required_inputs.description: Intended outcomes and why each one matters.

required_inputs.name: SUCCESS_SIGNALS
required_inputs.description: Observable signals or metrics that indicate the brief succeeded.

required_inputs.name: CONSTRAINTS
required_inputs.description: Explicit time, policy, compatibility, resource, or non-goal constraints.

required_inputs.name: KNOWN_NON_GOALS
required_inputs.description: Items that should stay out of scope even if adjacent to the problem.
